bas-sandwich-bread.name: Ba's Sandwich Bread
instructions: Combine yeast and sugar in a medium bowl (or in the bowl of a stand mixer) and add 1 cup warm water; stir to dissolve yeast. Let rest until foamy, about 5 minutes.

Add milk powder, salt, and 3 cups flour and mix with a wooden spoon (or beat with a dough hook if using stand mixer) until no dry spots remain. Mix in ½ cup more flour and 4 Tbsp. softened butter a few pieces at a time, adding more flour if needed to incorporate butter, until a soft dough forms.

Turn dough out onto a lightly floured work surface. Knead until smooth and elastic, adding more flour if needed to keep dough from becoming too sticky, 10–15 minutes (alternatively, knead with dough hook in stand mixer on medium speed 8–10 minutes). Form dough into a ball, rolling and tucking edges underneath. Lightly brush a medium bowl with melted butter. Place dough in bowl and lightly brush with melted butter. Cover with plastic wrap and let rise in a warm, draft-free spot until almost doubled in size, about 1 hour.

Lightly butter a 9x5" loaf pan. Gently punch down dough then turn out onto a lightly floured work surface and gently roll out to a 9" log. Pinch seam to close, then place log, seam side down, in prepared pan and cover lightly with plastic wrap. Let rest until dough rises about 1" above rim, 60–75 minutes.

Preheat oven to 350°. Using a sharp knife, score loaf lengthwise down the center of the top, about ½" deep, if desired. Brush with any remaining melted butter. Bake bread until deep golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped with your fingertips, 50–60 minutes. Let cool in pan on a wire rack at least 30 minutes before turning out and slicing.
Do Ahead: Bread can be kept tightly wrapped at room temperature for 3 days or frozen for up to 1 month; cool completely before storing.

baby-bell-peppers-with-chicken-salad.name: Baby Bell Peppers With Chicken Salad
instructions: Mix chicken, jalapeno pepper, 2 green onions, and mayonnaise together in bowl until thoroughly combined. Stuff each baby bell pepper half with chicken mixture.
Mix half of the remaining green onion with cottage cheese; use the other half to garnish stuffed baby bell peppers. Serve baby bell peppers alongside cottage cheese mixture and cherries.

bacon-sausage-egg-wrapped-breakfast-burr.name: Bacon & Sausage Egg Wrapped Breakfast Burrito
instructions: In a medium size bowl, whisk together the eggs, salt, and Parmesan until well combined.

In a medium size saucepan over medium-high heat, melt the butter and pour the egg mixture into the pan. Let the egg cook just until it starts to set, then add the cheddar cheese, potatoes, sausage, and bacon to the center of the egg wrap.
Cover with a lid and cook for another 3 minutes, or until the egg is fully cooked through and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the pan and fold in the egg wrap’s left and right sides, then roll from the bottom to the top to form a burrito.
Enjoy!

bacon-shrimp-scampi-pasta.name: Bacon Shrimp Scampi Pasta

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook spaghetti in the boiling water, stirring occasionally, until nearly tender, about 8 minutes.
Meanwhile, cook bacon in a large skillet over medium heat until crisp, about 4 minutes. Drain on paper towels, leaving about 1 1/2 tablespoons grease in the skillet.

Add garlic to hot grease and cook until fragrant, about 30 seconds. Add shrimp and sprinkle with red pepper flakes. Cook until just cooked through and pink, about 2 minutes per side. Remove from the skillet and set aside.

Pour chicken broth into the hot skillet, and cook for about 1 minute. Stir in heavy cream, and bring to a simmer, about 2 minutes. Reduce heat to low, whisk in Parmesan cheese, and cook until sauce starts to thicken, about 2 minutes.
Drain spaghetti, reserving 1/2 cup of pasta water.

Return shrimp and bacon to the skillet and simmer until heated through, about 1 minute. Add spaghetti and toss all ingredients together. Whisk in some of the reserved pasta water if sauce is too thick. Season with salt and pepper.
Garnish with chopped parsley and serve with a fresh lemon wedge to be squeezed over the pasta.

baked-asparagus.name: Baked Asparagus
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Spread out asparagus in a single layer on a baking sheet and drizzle with olive oil. Roll asparagus back and forth until evenly coated with oil.

Bake in the preheated oven until asparagus is lightly browned and easily pierced with a knife, 20 to 30 minutes, depending on the thickness of asparagus. Flip asparagus. Season with salt and drizzle with balsamic vinegar. Continue baking until balsamic vinegar starts to caramelize, about 1 minute more.

baked-baked-potatoes-with-onion-recipe-p.name: Baked Baked Potatoes With Onion ( Recipe)
baked-baked-potatoes-with-onion-recipe-p.original_name: Patatas panaderas al horno con cebolla (receta FÁCIL)
instructions: Pelamos las patatas, lavamos y cortamos en rodajas finas. Las colocamos en una bandeja de horno, superponiendo un poco unas con otras.
We share above the onion cut into fine juwith, we add some salt and the hot parsley. A splinter of white wine and a generous one of extra virgin olive oil.
We put the plate into the oven that will have to be preheated at 180 ° C until baker's potatoes are cooked, usually about 25 or 30 minutes.

baked-corn-on-the-cob.name: Baked Corn On The Cob
instructions: Combine water, sugar, and salt in a container large enough to hold corn until sugar and salt dissolve.
Submerge corn in brine; soak at least 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Remove corn from brine, shake to remove excess liquid, and discard remaining brine.
Cook in the preheated oven directly on an oven rack for 1 hour.

baked-minced-meat-and-peas-pasta-lezzet.name: Baked Minced Meat And Peas Pasta
instructions: 1. Done interior material for the flaws of the coast, culture can swell the vegetables with a dump cloth and chop them in the form of membrane.
2. Carrot in the form of membranes.
3. Peel the bark of butter and clean the bark in the form of cube after cleaning them.
4. Roast in the saucepan with butter.
5.  Havucu ve domatesi ekleyin.
6. Add more roasting mushrooms for 5 minutes.
7. Aka&ccedil is tasted by adding salt, peas, chopped fesle and pepper after minutes.
8. Get from January.
9. Cake 1 tsp salt added boiling water for 8 minutes and strain.
10. Kü Mix;it share oven containers.
11. 11. 11. 11. A stream of cream.
12. Place language cheeses in the long-running mix u on the floor.
12. August SALT from the oven to 200 degrees, heat up to 15 minutes.
14 July Take the oven and serve hot.

baked-pork-chops-with-sauerkraut.name: Baked Pork Chops With Sauerkraut

ingredients.item: Salt and freshly ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Rub pork chops with salt and pepper on both sides. Heat oil in a skillet over medium-high heat and pan-fry pork chops on both sides until browned, 5 to 7 minutes per side.
Place browned pork chops into the prepared casserole dish.
Combine sauerkraut, apple, onion, brown sugar, and caraway seeds in a bowl; cover pork chops with the mixture. Cover tightly with aluminum foil to retain moisture.
Bake pork chops in the preheated oven until no longer pink in the center, about 45 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the center should read 63°C (63 degrees C).

baked-rigatoni.name: Baked Rigatoni
instructions: Heat oil in a large saucepan over medium heat. Add onion and cook until soft, 3 to 4 minutes. Add sausage; stir to break up lumps and cook until lightly browned and crumbly, 6 to 8 minutes. Drain and discard grease.
Add undrained tomatoes, water, basil, oregano, and parsley to the pan; bring to a boil over medium heat. Reduce heat to low and cook, partially covered, for 25 minutes.

Meanwhile, bring a large pot of lightly salted water to a boil. Cook rigatoni in the boiling water, stirring occasionally until tender yet firm to the bite, 10 to 12 minutes. Drain, rinse under cool water, and drain again. Transfer to a large bowl and set aside.
Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).

Uncover the sauce and increase heat to medium. Cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce thickens, 6 to 8 minutes. Remove from heat and add 2/3 of the sauce to pasta; toss to combine. Stir in mozzarella cheese and 1 cup Parmesan cheese. Transfer to a 9x13-inch baking dish, pour remaining sauce over top, and cover with aluminum foil..
Bake in the preheated oven for 25 minutes. Uncover, sprinkle with remaining Parmesan, and bake until lightly browned, about 10 minutes longer.

balaban-kebab-recipe-lezzet.name: Balaban Kebab Recipe

ingredients.item: Half cup owl bread or galeta mug
1 cup of hot meat water (for the pad)
Instead of scaling, you can use a mixture of lamb–dana. This blend creates a taste and soft texture to meatballs.
Bayat bread forstead of galeta boiled or finely preferred bread crumbs. Thus, meatballs are more easily recovered.
When the nail is not in the pide instead of the nail, lava, bassing or small cubes cut pide bread can be used.
sued in yogurt; it is possible to add a flavor.
In addition to tomato paste a amount of pepper to use the saucer enriches the color and flavor.
Kö green pepper or cherry tomatoes in the grill instead of tomatoes and peppers can also be preferred by interior.
If you want to be more fluid, you can adjust the consistency by adding spoon meat water or hot water.
At the service stage u you can get a different flavor by spreading fine span parsley, flakes or water.

instructions: 1. All materials for meatballs are thoroughly paid until it is impossible.
2. Harç from Olive size in the form of mulch light.
3. Bake the k&ouml you are prepared in less oil pans or grills to both sides fry.
4. Chire add butter in a sauce saucepan and add salça and short time roast.
5. Then add a little water, salt and a pinch of sugar add a few boil minutes.
6. Take the stove with light consistency.
7. Put the nail pides in small parchcan be replaced the plate and fortune.
8. Let the breads lightly softened by visiting hot meat water to their cars.

12. Add moles and peppers.
12. August Finally, the fried butter is served in the dish uniformly.
14.  Afiyet olsun.

banana-and-chocolate-cake-pequerecetas.name: Banana And Chocolate Cake

ingredients.item: 1 cucharadita de bicarbonato de sodio (p.ej. este)
3 tablespoons cocoa powder for pastry (e. g.)
1/2 cucharadita de nuez moscada molida (p.ej. este)
1 pizca de clavos de olor en polvo (.p.ej. este)
Molde para bizcocho de 25 cm (por ejemplo, este)

instructions: To purify the oven at 180 been 3 been with heat up and down. Filling a large elongated mold (about 30 cm) with butter and sprinkle with flour or feed with oven paper. Beat soft butter with sugar in a big bowl for several minutes till crema. Add the eggs one by one, beating well after each addition.
Now add cinnamon, nutmeg, ground nail, bicarbonate and cocoa powder and mix well. To mix the flour with the chemical yeast, to put it into the mass and to remove only up to a homogenous mass.
Milling mature bananas with a fork and integrating them into the mass with soft movements.
Gather the dough into the prepared mold and bake at the centre of the oven for about 50 to 60 minutes. To the end of the cooking, do the stick test: if you get clear, the biscuit's ready
After baking, let the banana biscuit stand at about 10- 15 minutes. Then clear with care and let cool completely onto a grid.

basic-lemon-vinaigrette.name: Basic Lemon Vinaigrette
instructions: Whisk oil and lemon juice in a small bowl or shake in a resealable jar to emulsify; season with salt and pepper.

basic-yellow-rice.name: Basic Yellow Rice
instructions: Heat butter in large, heavy saucepan over medium heat. Add shallots; cook and stir until softened and translucent, about 3 minutes. Pour in rice, garlic, salt, turmeric, coriander, cumin, and bay leaves. Continue to cook and stir for 3 minutes. Add chicken broth and bring to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and cook until broth is absorbed and rice is tender, 20 to 25 minutes.
Remove from heat. Discard bay leaves. Transfer to a bowl.

bechamel-and-vegetable-chicken-recipe-le.name: Bechamel And Vegetable Chicken Recipe

ingredients.item: You can use the meat instead of chicken; a more Juicy and soft drinks.
Vegan alternatively grilled tofu or vegetable protein instead of chicken can be preferred.
Instead of potato pumpkin, carrot or you can use sweet potatoes; this fits different color and flavor to the tongue.
A lighter version of the potatoes you can completely freyou can.
You can use yellow pepper or pepper mixture instead of red and green pepper.
Light bitter lovers can be added to to some jalapeno or spike pepper.
Normal onion can be used in pırasa or barley onions instead; gives a lighter taste and aroma.
You can change flavor and flavor using butter or avocado oil instead.
You can use almond milk, soy milk or oatme milk instead of milk; suitable for vegan or lactose free version.
You can mix with semi-half cream.
Instead of butter, olive oil or margarine can be used; sos become lighter.
Instead of white flour, full wheat flour, corn flour or gluten-free flour mixture can be used.
You can add different flavours with less quantity reindeed parmesan or hardal powder instead.
You can use mozzarella, cheddar or parmesan instead of Kasar.
Vegan alternatively herbal grated cheese can also be preferred.
During the service you can sprinkle fresh parsley, dill or feslene; both visuality will add both flavor.

instructions: 1. Onion, potatoes, peppers, green peppers and chicken sky small cubes in cü
2. Heat the olive oil in the pan and roast the onion until pink, then add chickens and so on.
3. Add potatoes and peppers and taste salt and pepper, cook 10–15 minutes until the materials soften.
4. Melt the butter in sauce pot, add flour and roast 1–2 minutes.
5. Suz st slowly adding and add the muskat rende with salt, pepper.
6. Cook until you're sos dark and smooth.
7. Oil the oven container, inner mortar article and & pupilel sauce to the car.
8. Spread Kasar cheese.
9. 180°C bake the oven 20–25 minutes, cheese melt till light fry.

beef-tas-kebabs-oriental-recipe-argiro.name: Beef Tas Kebabs, Oriental Recipe
instructions: Cut the meat into pieces, the size of a bit.
After drying it on kitchen paper, transfer to flour and shake the exces.
Heat the butter with the olive oil in a pot and add the meat from all sides for 4 to 5 minutes.
Then, add the onion and let it spend for 4 to 5 minutes, without color.
Add the paste to the pot and rub with spatula or spoon.
Allow for 1 minute to make and remove its aromas.
Add the wine and allow half the alcohol to Evaporate.
Add warm water or beat broth, just covering the meat.
Cover the pot and lower the temperature.
Let the beef bottle on low heat for about 1 hour, until the meat softens well.
Sausage should just as well be boating.
To the end of the boat, add the sparks, salt and pepper.
You must serve the delicious beef kebab with rice or even better with traditional oriental ajem pilafi!

beer-braised-carnitas.name: Beer-braised Carnitas

ingredients.item: Dried new mexico or guajillo chiles

instructions: Toast chiles in a dry large heavy pot over medium heat until slightly puffed and lightly darkened on both sides, about 2 minutes. Remove from pot; let cool. Stem chiles and halve lengthwise; discard seeds.
Bring chiles, pork, beer, garlic, salt, and 1 cup water to a boil in same pot. Reduce heat, cover, and simmer, stirring occasionally, until pork is fork-tender, 60-80 minutes.

Uncover pork; simmer until liquid evaporates and pork begins to brown, 20-25 minutes. Continue to cook, stirring frequently and scraping bottom of pot, until pork is shredded and browned, 10-15 minutes.

Add 1 cup water to pork; cook, scraping up browned bits from bottom of pot, for about 1 minute.
Do Ahead: Carnitas can be made 3 days ahead. Let cool. Cover and chill. Reheat with ½ cup water in a covered pot, adding more water if needed to keep pork moist.

bellini.name: Bellini
instructions: Bring a large pot of water to a boil. Using the tip of a paring knife, make two 1" cuts on the bottom of each peach, forming an X. Add peaches to water and cook just until skin begins to peel back at each X, 30–40 seconds. Using a slotted spoon, transfer peaches to a large bowl of ice water; let cool. Peel peaches. (Alternatively, use a vegetable peeler with a serrated blade to peel peaches)

Halve peaches; discard pits. Chop fruit; transfer to a large bowl. Add 2 Tbsp. lemon juice and 1 Tbsp. sugar; toss to evenly coat. Press plastic wrap against peaches to prevent discoloration. Chill for 20 minutes.

Transfer peach mixture to a blender. Purée until smooth. Strain purée through a fine-mesh sieve into a large pitcher. Season to taste with more lemon juice or sugar (if adding more sugar, be sure to stir until it dissolves). Add Prosecco, then stir slowly to blend (stirring gently will prevent Prosecco from foaming up). Gently divide Bellini among Champagne glasses.

berry-cheesecake-crepes.name: Berry Cheesecake Crepes
instructions: In a large bowl, combine flour, eggs, butter, and sugar, stirring until ingredients are slightly mixed.
Add the milk ½ cup (120 ml) at a time, stirring vigorously, making sure the milk is completely incorporated into the batter and that the batter is smooth before adding more milk.
Repeat with the rest of the milk. The batter should be very liquidy and have no lumps.
In a pan over medium heat, pour ⅓ cup (95 g) of the batter in the center and swirl the batter around the edges of the pan until set.
To know when the crepe is ready to flip, lift up one of the edges about ⅓ of the way. The bottom side should be golden brown. Flip the crepe.
Cook until the edges are starting to slightly crisp.
Remove from heat and cover with a paper towel to make sure the crepes stay moist.
In a pot over medium heat, combine all the berries with the lemon juice and the sugar, stirring until the mixture comes to a boil.
Cook for about 2 minutes, then remove from heat and cool completely.
Mix the cream cheese with the powdered sugar until smooth.
Spread half of the cream cheese mixture on one side of the crepe.
Spread half of the berries on top of the cream cheese.
Fold the crepe over the berries, then fold in half.
Repeat with the other crepe.
Serve with powdered sugar.
Enjoy!

biscuit-bit-o-heaven.name: Biscuit: Bit O Heaven
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
In a large bowl, whisk together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
Using your hands or a pastry cutter, work the butter into the dry ingredients until the butter breaks down to pea-sized pieces.
Add the milk and fold with a rubber spatula until fully incorporated and the dough comes together in a ball.
Scoop the dough into 12 portions onto the prepared baking sheet. Brush each biscuit with honey.
Bake for about 20 minutes, or until the tops are golden brown.
Serve the biscuits with bacon jam and soft-boiled eggs.
Enjoy!

black-and-white-cookies.name: Black And White Cookies
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Line a cookie sheet with parchment paper.

Make cookies: Mix together flour, salt, and baking powder in a medium bowl until well combined and set aside. Beat together sugar and butter in a large bowl using an electric mixer until creamy, about 3 minutes. Add eggs and beat for 30 seconds more. Add lemon zest, vanilla, and lemon extract; mix well. Add flour mixture and milk gradually in equal 1/3 proportions, mixing well after each addition until fully incorporated.
Spoon cookie dough into 1/4-cup portions onto the prepared cookie sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges just begin to turn golden brown, 13 to 15 minutes. Transfer cookies to a wire rack to cool completely.

While cookies cool, make vanilla icing: Melt butter in a double boiler over medium heat. Stir in confectioners' sugar, corn syrup, vanilla, and salt. Add water gradually until icing comes together. Heat over a double boiler until icing falls off the back of a spoon in thick ribbons, 2 to 4 minutes. Set heat to low.
Frost 1/2 of the golden brown underside of each cooled cookie with vanilla icing using a rubber spatula. Allow excess to dribble back into the double boiler. Let cookies cool for 10 minutes.

Meanwhile, making chocolate icing: Set the double boiler back to medium heat and add confectioners' sugar, semisweet chocolate, bittersweet chocolate, corn syrup, butter, vanilla, and food coloring to remaining vanilla icing. Mix well, adding water until icing is combined. Heat until icing falls off of the back of a spoon in thick ribbons, 2 to 4 minutes. Set heat to low.
Frost the other 1/2 of the cooled cookies using a rubber spatula in the same manner as before. Let cookies cool until icing sets, 1 to 2 hours.

black-bean-chili-with-butternut-squash.name: Black Bean Chili With Butternut Squash

ingredients.item: Chipotle chiles from canned chipotle chiles in adobo

ingredients.prep: peeled, seeded, cut into 1/2-inch cubes (about 3 cups)

ingredients.item: Coarsely grated hot pepper monterey jack cheese

instructions: Heat oil in heavy large pot over medium-high heat. Add onions and cook until soft and beginning to brown, stirring often, about 8 minutes. Add garlic; stir 1 minute. Sprinkle chili powder and coriander over; stir 1 minute. Stir in tomatoes with juice, beans, chipotles, and oregano. Add 10 cups water. Bring to boil, reduce heat to low, cover with lid slightly ajar, and simmer until beans are tender, stirring occasionally, about 2 hours (time will vary depending on freshness of beans). Season to taste with coarse salt and freshly ground black pepper. DO AHEAD Chili can be made up to 2 days ahead. Cool slightly. Refrigerate uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled. Rewarm chili before continuing.

Stir squash and bulgur into chili. Simmer uncovered over medium-low heat until squash and bulgur are tender, about 30 minutes. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Divide chili among bowls. Serve with sour cream, cheese, red onion, cilantro, and pickled jalapeño rings.

black-forest-chocolates-by-giannos-valia.name: Black Forest Chocolates By Giannos Valiano
black-forest-chocolates-by-giannos-valia.original_name: Σοκολατάκια Black Forest από τον Γιάννο Βαλιάνο
instructions: We're crushing the cake.
In a bowl, mix the cream cheese with the liqueur with a spoon.
Then add the crushed chocolate cake and wear a glass and make a dough.
Ideally place the dough in the freezer for 2-3 minutes to stand.
Then, wearing two gloves, take some dough with the three ringers, make it into a ball and paste it so that it becomes around and thin.
We take a Cherry and place it in the center. Then we lock it together by joining the Edges and form again into a ball.
We make all our chocolates the same way and spread them into a baking pan with parchment paper.
Then place the chocolates in the refrigerator for half to 1 hour or in the freezer for 10 minutes.
To cover them, melt the couverture into a ben marie. After it melts, add the sunflower oil and mix.
Transfer to a long container or to a small bowl to drive them more easily.
Remove the chocolates from the refrigerator and dip them into the chocolate with the help of two forks.
Drain each chocolate well and then put it back on the baking pan.
Finally we can melt some white or black chocolate and make draws above or else make plans with whatever chocolate has left over from the coating.
We thank Pastry Chef Janno Valiano for grating the resolution.

black-rice-with-hazelnuts.name: Black Rice With Hazelnuts

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground pepper

instructions: Combine rice, a pinch of salt, and 1¾ cups water in a medium saucepan and bring to a boil over high heat. Lower heat to a bare simmer and cook, covered, until rice is tender, 30–35 minutes. Let stand, covered, 5 minutes. Drain any excess water.
Mix together rice and walnut oil, season with salt and pepper, and stir in hazelnuts.

black-rice-with-squid.name: Black Rice With Squid
instructions: If the squid has tentacles, pull them away from the body. Cut the squid into 1-inch strips. Then cut into 1-inch cubes. Pour the fish stock into a saucepan, cover, and bring to a simmer. Put a large pan over high heat and add the oil. Add the squid. Fry for 2 minutes, until golden in places. Add the sofrito and continue to cook over medium heat for 10 minutes. Add a teaspoon of water if the sofrito starts to stick to the bottom of the pan. Add the rice, stirring it into the squid. Fry for 10 minutes, stirring often. Turn the heat to high and add a ladle of stock, stirring continuously. Once the stock has been absorbed, add another ladle and repeat until 5 minutes have passed. Dissolve the squid ink in a little of the remaining stock. Add this to the rice, and then continue adding the rest of the stock. Cook the rice for another 12 minutes, stirring frequently. Add the picada and continue to cook for another 2 minutes, or until the rice has absorbed most of the liquid and is just tender to the bite. Season with salt, then serve.

blackberry-and-mascarpone-crumble-bars.name: Blackberry And Mascarpone Crumble Bars
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 9x13-inch baking pan.
Mix flour, almond meal, sugar, baking powder, cinnamon, and salt for dough together in a bowl. Cut in butter until it is pea-sized. Mix in egg and vanilla extract until dough is crumbly.
Pat 1/2 of the dough into the bottom of the prepared pan, saving the remaining dough for the topping.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges just start to turn brown, 15 to 20 minutes. Remove from the oven and allow to cool. Leave the oven on.
Beat mascarpone cheese, sugar, 1/2 of the lemon zest, and 1/2 of the lemon juice together in a bowl for mascarpone filling.
Combine blackberries, sugar, remaining lemon zest, remaining lemon juice, cornstarch, orange liqueur, and salt for blackberry filling in another bowl.
Spread mascarpone filling across the cooled bottom crust. Spread blackberry filling over mascarpone filling, then sprinkle reserved dough in crumbles evenly over top.

Bake in the preheated oven until filling is bubbling and top crust is lightly browned, 40 to 45 minutes. Cool to room temperature, about 30 minutes. For best results, refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight before cutting into 16 bars.

blackberry-bonito-in-the-oven-argiro.name: Blackberry Bonito In The Oven
instructions: We're asking the fish-soldier to cut the bonnet in slides of 1 cm.
Wash the fish in a colander and sprinkle with some salt.
Add to a 20×30 cm baking pan the potatoes, onion, leek, garlic, tomato and parsley.
Add salt, pepper, olive oil and 1 cup.
Mix the instrumentals in the baking pan and cover them with non-stick paper and fol.
Place the baking pan on the medium rack of a well preheated oven and baking at 200°C for 30 minutes, until the potatoes soften.
Uncover and add the bonnets by introducing the sauce.
Add a spoon to the fish and continue baking for 15 minutes.
Turn off the oven and allow the food to stand for 10 minutes.
Serve on the dishes the ports with potatoes and some sauce.

blackberry-jalapeno-glazed-ham.name: Blackberry Jalapeno Glazed Ham
instructions: Set oven rack about 6 inches from the heat source and preheat the oven's broiler to high. Place jalapeno peppers on a baking sheet.
Broil in the preheated oven, turning every 2 to 3 minutes, until skin on the jalapenos is blackened and bubbling, 8 to 10 minutes.

Remove jalapeno peppers from oven and place in a resealable plastic bag; set aside for 5 to 10 minutes. Carefully open the bag and remove jalapeno peppers; let sit until easily handled. Peel blackened skin from jalapeno peppers, slice open, remove the seeds, and mince the pepper.

Combine jalapeno peppers, blackberries, water, brown sugar, honey, orange juice, orange-flavored liqueur, garlic, and orange zest in a saucepan over medium heat; simmer for 5 to 10 minutes. Reduce heat to low and continue simmering until glaze has reduced in size and is thickened, 5 to 10 minutes more. Mash the glaze with a potato masher until blackberries are broken down. Remove saucepan from heat.
Reduce oven temperature to 163°C (165 degrees C). Place the ham in a roasting pan and brush some of the glaze over the ham; cover loosely with aluminum foil.

Bake in the preheated oven, basting with glaze every 20 minutes, until an instant-read thermometer inserted into the center reads at least 63°C (63 degrees C), about 3 hours. Remove ham from oven and brush with more glaze. Let stand for 10 minutes before slicing.

blini-russian-pancakes.name: Blini (russian Pancakes)
instructions: Beat together milk and eggs in a large bowl until combined.
Beat in sugar and salt. Mix in baking soda and citric acid until incorporated.
Blend in flour, a little at a time, until combined. Beat in oil. Pour in boiling water, stirring constantly, until batter is thin and watery. Let rest for about 20 minutes.

Brush a small frying pan with 1 tablespoon melted butter over medium-high heat. Pick the pan up off the heat. Pour in a ladleful of batter while you rotate your wrist, tilting the pan, so batter forms a circle and coats the bottom. The blini should be very thin.
Return the pan to the heat. Cook blini for 90 seconds. Carefully lift up edge of blini to see if it's fully cooked: edges will be golden and bottom surface should have brown spots.
Flip blini over and cook for 1 minute more.
Transfer blini to a plate lined with a clean kitchen towel.
Continue cooking remaining batter, adding 1 tablespoon butter to the pan for every 4 blinis. Stack blinis and cover with another kitchen towel to keep warm.
Spread desired filling in the center of each blini.
Fold 3 times to make a triangle shape or fold up all 4 sides, like a small burrito.

blistered-padron-peppers.name: Blistered Padrón Peppers
instructions: Heat 1 Tbsp. oil in a large skillet over high heat until just smoking. Add half of the peppers; cook, tossing occasionally, until skins are blistered and flesh is softened, about 4 minutes. Transfer to a bowl, sprinkle with salt, and toss to coat. Repeat with remaining peppers, remaining 1 Tbsp. oil, and more salt.

blueberry-oat-scones.name: Blueberry Oat Scones

ingredients.item: (1 stick plus 3 tablespoons) chilled unsalted butter
*also called turbinado or demerara sugar; available at most supermarkets and at natural foods stores.

instructions: Position 1 rack in top third and 1 rack in bottom third of oven and preheat to 177°C. Line 2 rimmed baking sheets with parchment paper.

Combine flour, brown sugar, baking powder, baking soda, and coarse salt in processor; blend 5 seconds. Add butter. Using on/off turns, blend until mixture resembles coarse meal. Transfer mixture to large bowl. Add 1 cup oats and blueberries; stir to blend evenly.
Stir half and half and vanilla in small bowl. Gradually add to flour mixture, tossing until dough just comes together (dough will be very moist).
Using 1/2-cup measuring cup for each scone, drop dough in mounds onto prepared baking sheets, spacing 3 inches apart. Sprinkle tops with remaining 3 tablespoons oats, then raw sugar.

Bake 15 minutes. Reverse sheets and continue baking until scones are golden and tester inserted into center from side comes out clean, about 12 minutes longer. Transfer scones to rack and cool slightly. Serve warm or at room temperature.

boiled-zucchini-recipe-lezzet.name: Boiled Zucchini Recipe
instructions: 1. Wash the zucchini and slice the portions in the ring or longitudinal.
2. Take olive oil to a medium-sized pot and add pumpkins to 2–3 minutes light.
3. U add snacks, salt and pepper to the car, cook with pumpkins up to 5 minutes.
4. Add and mix pomegranate sour when pumpkins.
5. 1–2 minutes more cook.
6. After January, sprinkle and fortune on the empty dereotini.

booshala-assyrian-yogurt-soup.name: Booshala (assyrian Yogurt Soup)
instructions: Place cabbage, celery, dill, and cilantro in a large stockpot. Pour in enough water to barely cover. Bring to a boil; cook uncovered until cabbage and celery are just tender, about 10 minutes. Add banana peppers. Stir in spinach bit by bit, waiting for it to wilt between batches. Reduce heat to medium-low.
Whisk yogurt and flour in a bowl. Add to the stockpot. Season with lemon juice and salt. Cook, stirring constantly, until yogurt is hot but not boiling, 7 to 10 minutes.

bosnian-pastry-lezzet.name: Bosnian Pastry
instructions: 1. Remove the unu pit from a rough.
2. Open the middle like the pool and add salt.
3. Add water to the ground and start kneading.
4. Continue kneading until you get a mildly hard dough.
5. Pour the dough into three equal glands and close it with a damp cloth and wait for 1 hour.
6. Wash the potatoes with plenty of water and sprinkle until soften.
7. Peel the shells and crush the 3 tablespoons of melted butter, salt and pepper and until it comes to the consistency of puree.
8. Open one of the doughy bezes with roller up to be the size of the dish plate.
9. Continue to open the dough as thin as possible using the upper parts of your two hands on the melted butter.
10. Remove melted butter on a flat floor.
11. 11. Place it in the form of a long piece on the yufka, taking some amount from potato mortar.
12. Wrap the Yufka in roll form.
12. August Extend the dough to not break with two hands.
14 July Larger parts of the roll from yufkadan walnut and gently roll it in your hands and index the butter into the tray side by side.
15. All the remaining doughs are prepared in this way and index to the tray.
16. Remove melted butter on dough balls.
17. September Cook for 45 minutes in the oven, which is pre-heated to 180 degrees.
18. Serve as Ilik.
19. September September What are the Tricks of the Empty Börf Recipe? When preparing the bill, add the leak to the azar and knead push.
20. If you pour all flour at once, the consistency of the dough will be hardened.
21. If the consistency of the dough is very soft, you can add flour.
22. So your böre will be smooth and fluffy.
23. Take care of your prepared dough until the dough used in baklava construction.
24. For chopped empty pastry; roast meat, onion and spices.
25. Then fill in the dough you open.
26. For cheese empty pastry; you can use lor cheese.
27. Cut the cheese with your hand before adding it to the dough.
28. For the spinach leg; wash and clean the spinach.
29. Then mix milk slippery with grated onion, 2 eggs and salt.
30. Share this tribute to the dough you open.
31. 1 Porsion Empty Bör How Calorie?100 grams of Spine is worth about 265 microns.

bouillabaisse.name: Bouillabaisse
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large saucepan; add onions, leeks, chopped tomatoes, and garlic. Cook and stir over low heat until vegetables have softened, about 3 to 5 minutes.

Stir in fennel, thyme, bay leaf, and orange zest. Add mussels, shrimp, and boiling water; stir to combine. Season to taste with salt and black pepper. Increase the heat to high, and boil for about 3 minutes to allow the oil and water to combine.
Add seabass and reduce the heat to medium. Continue cooking until fish is opaque and tender, but still firm, about 12 to 15 minutes. Fish should not be falling apart.
Taste the bouillabaisse and adjust the seasoning. Stir in saffron, and then pour soup into a warmed tureen or soup dishes. Serve immediately.

braised-beef-with-red-onion-gremolata.name: Braised Beef With Red Onion Gremolata

ingredients.item: Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper
Kosher salt and freshly ground black pepper

instructions: Preheat oven to 325°. Tie roast with kitchen twine at 1” intervals; season with salt and pepper.

Heat oil in a large ovenproof pot over medium-high heat. Cook onions, stirring occasionally, until soft, 10–15 minutes. Add wine, vinegar, and sugar. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer until reduced by half, 10–12 minutes. Add garlic and broth and return to a simmer; add roast and thyme. Cover and braise in oven, turning roast occasionally, until roast is tender, 2½–3 hours.
Transfer roast to a large baking dish and strain braising liquid over. Cover and chill onions. Cover and chill roast at least 12 hours.
DO AHEAD: Roast can be braised 2 days ahead. Keep chilled.
Combine onion and vinegar in a medium bowl. Let sit 30 minutes; drain. Add chile, basil, chives, parsley, and lemon zest and toss; season with salt and pepper.

Scrape fat from beef; discard. Transfer beef to a cutting board. Bring solidified braising liquid to a boil in a large saucepan. Reduce heat and simmer, stirring occasionally, until reduced to 2 cups, 25–30 minutes. Add vinegar and braised onions; season sauce with salt and pepper.

Place flour in a shallow bowl. Remove twine from roast and slice into eight 1–1½” pieces; season with salt and pepper. Heat oil in a large nonstick skillet over medium heat. Working in batches, dredge meat in flour and cook until browned and crisp, about 4 minutes per side. Arrange on a platter and drizzle with sauce; top with gremolata.

breaded-chicken-sandwich-recipe-comedera.name: Breaded Chicken Sandwich Recipe
breaded-chicken-sandwich-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de sándwich de pollo empanado

ingredients.item: 4  filetes de pechuga de pollo cortada delgada
Sal y pimienta negra al gusto

instructions: On a deep plate, mix flour with some salt and black pepper. On another deep plate, add the egg and drink it well. And at a third plate as well, mix the frosted bread with some salt and black pepper.
Ahora procede a hacer los empanizados: primero empapa los filetes de pollo en la harina, luego los pasas por el huevo y finalmente en el pan rallado, procurando que cada filete quede bien cubierto.
Warm up enough olive oil in a frying pan with medium-high heat. Add minced and cold chicken steaks until they are golden and cooked. Cook them for about 5 minutes each side.
Mientras tanto, corta las rodajas de cebolla morada y los tomates en rodajas.
To put the sandwich together, cut a small baguette per person by half throughout. He puts a pitted chicken steak into his bread, adds his tomato cuts, his purple onion and lettuce leaves.
To make the second sandwich repeat the process with the other bread and chicken steaks.
That's it, now to enjoy your best.

breaded-pork-in-the-air-fryer-teleculina.name: Breaded Pork In The Air Fryer

ingredients.item: 2 colheres (sopa) de vinagre de vinho branco

instructions: Cut the meat into strips 1 cm wide, season them with salt, pepper and lemon juice and let marinate for 2 minutes. Then pass them for flour, eggs beaten, bread grated.
Put the cops in the air fryer, 180 degrees for 20 minutes. If they don't all fit in the air fryer, repeat the operation until the meat is finished.
Prepare o molho: refogue a cebola e os alhos, descascados e picados, no azeite, depois adicione os restantes ingredientes, envolva bem e deixe cozinhar, em lume brando, por cerca de 15 minutos.
In the end, slightly crush the sauce with the magic wand and serve with the pork strips.

breakfast-taco-cups.name: Breakfast Taco Cups
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375ºF (190ºC). Generously coat a 12-cup muffin tin with nonstick spray.
Stack the tortillas and cut off the edges so the tortillas are square. Then, quarter the squares so you have 12 small tortilla pieces.
Press a tortilla square into each cup of the prepared muffin tin.
Fill each cup with 1 tablespoon of refried beans, 1 tablespoon of scrambled eggs, and 1 teaspoon of cheese and top with a cherry tomato quarter.
Bake for about 10 minutes, until the edges of the tortillas are golden brown and the cheese has melted.
Garnish with cilantro.
Enjoy!

brewers-chicken-teleculinaria.name: Brewer's Chicken
instructions: Get the chicken and cut it into regular pieces. Peel and pinch your garlic teeth.
In a bowl, add the chicken, onion soup, beers, sweet pepper, lemon zest to taste, salt and pepper and chopped garlic teeth and the laurel leaf. Involve and let marinate for 20 minutes.
In a pressure cooker, put the olive oil and let it warm, add the chicken and core on both sides. Then add the marinade, close the pot and let cook for 15 minutes.
Take it out of the fire, wait a minute and let the steam out of the pan. Open only when it is safe, remove the chicken and serve decorated to taste and accompany with rice.

brioche-dough-argiro.name: Brioche Dough
instructions: Add the first 6 ingredients, flour, milk, yeast, salt, sugar, eggs in the bowl with the dough hook. We first brought at low speed until the materials are combined.
Continue the dough at moderate speed for about 7-8 minutes, until we have an elastic dough.
With the mixer in operation, pour the butter into pieces by kneading until it comes off the walls and no longer sticks in the hands.
In the end, the dough should not exceed 24-25oC.
Place it in a bowl, wrap with membrane and let it rest.
When it doubles in volume, deflate it on the counter and refrigerate, where it will make the second puff as it cools.
When the second puff is done, deflate it on the counter and place it in a bowl. Wrap with membrane.
At 5oC (fridge) it is maintained until the next day, giving the desired shape.
Brush with melted butter the preparations we will make with this dough.

broccoli-with-raisins-and-nuts.name: Broccoli With Raisins And Nuts

ingredients.item: Florets from 2 large heads of broccoli

instructions: Blanch broccoli florets in boiling water 5 minutes or, even better, steam 10 minutes.

Heat  oil in a large pan over medium-low. Cook garlic, stirring often, until garlic releases its aroma, about 2 minutes. Add onion and cook, stirring occasionally, until translucent, about 5 minutes. Add broccoli and stir to coat, then add raisins, vinegar, brown sugar, salt, and pepper. Cook, stirring, until sugar is dissolved, then stir in ¼ cup water. Reduce heat to low and cook, partially covered, 30 minutes. If broccoli dries out too much, add a splash more water. Uncover and continue to cook until water is evaporated and broccoli is very soft and slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes more.
Transfer broccoli mixture to a platter. Top with pine nuts.

brochette-de-lapin-aux-pruneaux.name: Brochette De Lapin Aux Pruneaux

ingredients.prep: divided into 2 legs, 2 loins, and 2 kidneys

instructions: 1. Bone the legs and loins. Cut each leg and each loin into 6 equal pieces; leave the kidneys whole.
2. Have ready 6 bamboo skewers. Thread the following onto each skewer: 1 leg piece, 1 bacon piece, 1 prune, 1 loin piece, 1 onion piece. Repeat again.
3. Arrange the skewers on a platter. Drizzle the olive oil evenly over the skewers, then sprinkle with the salt. Pluck the needles from the rosemary sprigs, and add a few pinches to each skewer.

4. Warm the canola oil and butter in a large frying pan over high heat. When the butter has melted and the fat is hot, add the skewers and cook, turning once, for 4 minutes on each side. Remove the pan from the heat and let the skewers rest for 3 minutes before serving.

brown-rice-argiro.name: Brown Rice

ingredients.item: Flower or parsley finely chopped for serving
Flower or parsley finely chopped for serving

instructions: Cut the Tender leads into pieces 3 cm.
Add them to a pot with a cup of water and simmer until the liquids Evaporate complete, half soften the pieces and dry.
Add 4 tabletspoons of olive oil or gallic oil and sauté the leaves along with the chopped onion for 5 minutes, until they soften and remove their perfume.
Add the paste and rub for 1 minute with a wooden sponge at the base of the vessel, to bake.
Add the price and mix to city for 1 minute.

Fill 5 cups of hot water or vegetable broth, sweet paprika, some salt and pepper and leave the food on low heat for 16-18 minutes stirring at interviews, but carefully so that the pieces do not melt. Rice should be juicy when we turn off the Hearth.
Cover the pot with a dry towel and lead and leave the reddish green rice for 5 minutes to draw its figure.
Serve while the pilafi is juicy by garnishing with a little dill or parsley.

brussels-sprouts-with-panko.name: Brussels Sprouts With Panko
instructions: Pour 1/4 to 1/2 inch corn oil in a large skillet and place over a high heat until hot. To test the temperature, slip half a Brussels sprout into the pan; if it makes a popping sound, the oil is hot enough. Working in batches, fry the Brussels sprouts, turning occasionally, until they are browned all over, 2 to 3 minutes. Using a slotted spoon, transfer the sprouts to a paper towel-lined plate to drain.
Meanwhile, whisk together the Thick Tahini Sauce , yogurt and pomegranate molasses in a medium bowl. Set aside.

In a small skillet, heat the olive oil over medium-high until hot. Add the garlic and saute until fragrant, about 1 minute. Add the panko and stir constantly until the crumbs are golden brown, about 2 minutes. Stir in the salt and remove the breadcrumbs from the heat. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to cool.
Place the Brussels sprouts in a serving dish, drizzle with the sauce and top with the panko crumbs. Serve immediately.

buckwheat-barley-lezzet.name: Buckwheat Barley
instructions: 1. Sauce the onion you eat and the yellowish olive oil you crushed until pink.
2. Cook and cook it from the stove until they are added and smelled.
3. Take the boiled buckwheat into a large mixing container.
4. Ilınan onion, add and mix the greens that you eat in the cucumber and fine.
5. Mix all necessary ingredients in a bowl and walk over the jealous.
6. Place marul leaves on the bottom of a service plate.
7. Add and serve on the shore.
8. You can find the jealousy recipe here.

buckwheat-muffins-with-vegetables-recipe.name: Buckwheat Muffins With Vegetables Recipe
buckwheat-muffins-with-vegetables-recipe.original_name: Receta de muffins de trigo sarraceno con verduras

ingredients.item: 1 taza  de harina de trigo sarraceno

instructions: Preheat oven at 200 ° C
Peel carrot and lava, scrape good. Do the same with the pumpkin and press to remove excess water. Reserve.
It incorporates both eggs into a big bowl and bates very well. Add sour cream, vanilla, butter, oil, sugar and pint of salt.
Bate muy bien hasta que todos los ingredientes se mezclen completamente.
Add Saracene wheat flour, oatmeal, baking powder and sodium bicarbonate. Mix very well till you have a homogenous texture.
Finally, it integrates pumpkins and pumpkins with wrapped movements.
Once you have ready the dough, put a portion of mixture into the muffins mold, don't scrape.
Hornea for 5 minutes 200 ° C
The temperature drops to 180 ° C and ends billing for 25 minutes or until they are well baked and golden.
You'll know they're ready when you pinch with a stick and get out perfectly clean.
When they're baked, let them stand a little and crumble. Enjoy!

buffalo-chicken-dynamite-rice.name: Buffalo Chicken Dynamite Rice
instructions: Preheat the oven to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Add chicken thighs and melted butter to a baking dish, and toss until coated. Season the top with salt.
Bake in the preheated oven until chicken is just cooked through, about 20 minutes.

While chicken is cooking, make sauce by adding mayonnaise, hot sauce, cayenne pepper, paprika, garlic powder, black pepper and white vinegar to a mixing bowl. Whisk together, and refrigerate until ready to use.

Remove cooked chicken from the oven. Transfer thighs to a plate or bowl, and place in the fridge until needed. Reserve all the juices and drippings from the casserole dish, and pour into a measuring cup. Add enough water to get to 1 2/3 cups.

Bring water-drippings mixture and rice to a boil in a saucepan. Reduce heat to medium-low, cover, and simmer until rice is tender and water has been absorbed, about 15 minutes. Turn off heat and allow rice to sit for 10 minutes longer.

Transfer cooked rice to the baking dish used to bake the chicken. Use a spoon to create an even layer, but do not pack or press rice down. Drizzle any accumulated sauce from the cooked chicken over the rice.

Transfer chicken to a cutting board and cut into 1/2-inch cubes. Add chicken to the mayo sauce and mix well. Sprinkle 1/2 of the celery over the rice. Spread out chicken-mayo mixture evenly over the rice. Crumble over about 1/2 of the blue cheese and season with some cayenne on top, if desired.
Preheat the oven to 232°C (230 degrees C).

Place baking dish in the preheated oven and cook until the top starts to brown, 15 to 20 minutes. For additional browning, set broiler to high, and broil top for 1 to 2 minutes to achieve more color. Garnish top with the rest of the celery, more blue cheese if desired, and another drizzle of hot sauce. Top with celery leaves if available. Serve hot, or at room temp.

buffalo-dip.name: Buffalo Dip
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat cream cheese in a deep baking dish until smooth. Add ranch dressing, Buffalo wing sauce, and mozzarella cheese to cream cheese and stir until smooth. Stir in chicken.
Bake in the preheated oven until heated through and bubbling, about 20 minutes.

butter-and-almond-stars-teleculinaria.name: Butter And Almond Stars
instructions: In a bowl, mix the butter well with the sugar. Then add the eggs one by one and always mixing very well.
Then add the flour and yeast slowly, crush to incorporate well and finally add the grated almond.

After all is well crushed, extend the dough with the help of the roller, cut into pieces with a star-shaped cutter and place it on an oven tray previously lined with vegetable paper. Bring it to the preheated oven at 170 Remove, let it cool, sprinkle with sugar or cocoa powder and serve.

butter-mochi-cupcakes.name: Butter Mochi Cupcakes
instructions: Preheat the oven to 191°C (190 degrees C). Grease a 12-cup cupcake pan.
Mix mochiko, sugar, and baking powder together until well combined. Add butter, coconut milk, evaporated milk, eggs, and vanilla. Whisk until completely smooth. Pour into the cupcake pan.
Bake in the preheated oven until edges are lightly golden brown, about 35 minutes.
Turn off the oven and let residual heat bake the cupcakes until dark golden brown, about 20 minutes more.

butter-salmon-recipe-comedera.name: Butter Salmon Recipe
butter-salmon-recipe-comedera.original_name: Receta de salmón a la mantequilla
instructions: Wash the fish steaks well till they are clear. Take them out with a napkin.
Soak salmon with salt and pepper to suit both sides.
Coloca las cucharadas de harina de trigo en un plato llano y le vas a espolvorear un poco de ajo en polvo.
Toma tus filetes y los vas a enharinar por ambos lados.
Warm up a big frying pan and you'll melt half the butter. Once melted, seal fish steaks from both sides with low heat till they are well cooked and soft. Withdraw them and reserve them.
At the same frying pan, put the other half of butter, thyme branches and lemon juice. Fold with low heat and cook for 3 minutes till a salsa forms.
Serve your fish steaks and you will pour his butter all over his surface till they are fully washed.
Enjoy!

buttermilk-syrup.name: Buttermilk Syrup
instructions: Heat sugar, buttermilk, and butter in a saucepan over medium heat until the mixture starts to boil, about 5 minutes.
Remove the saucepan from heat and stir baking soda and vanilla into the buttermilk mixture.

butternut-squash-pumpkin-spice-soup.name: Butternut Squash-pumpkin Spice Soup
instructions: Preheat the oven to 218°C (220 degrees C).
Make pumpkin spice: Mix cinnamon, ginger, nutmeg, allspice, and cloves together in a small bowl until evenly combined. Set aside.
Make soup: Place butternut squash and onions into a large bowl. Drizzle with olive oil and toss to coat. Transfer to a baking sheet.
Roast in the preheated oven until soft, 25 to 30 minutes.

Transfer squash-onion mixture to the bowl of a food processor. Add vegetable broth, cream, and salt; blend until smooth. Add 4 tablespoons pumpkin spice; blend until combined. Ladle into 6 microwave-safe soup bowls.
Cook each serving in the microwave on high until hot, about 1 minute, stirring every 30 seconds.
Top each serving with 1 1/2 tablespoons Greek yogurt and 1/2 teaspoon pumpkin spice.
